data.title: James Wynn’s Bitcoin long position loss expanded to $4 million, with liquidation price at $104,610
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to HypurrScan data, the floating loss of the 40-fold Bitcoin long position of the whale James Wynn has now expanded to 4 million US dollars. The specific holdings are as follows:
Total position value: 178.34 million US dollars
Opening price: 107,993.1 US dollars
Liquidation price: 104,610 US dollars

data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin ETFs See $347M Outflow in a Single Day — BlackRock’s IBIT Defies the Trend
data.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs in the U.S. saw a collective $347 million outflow on May 29, ending a 10-day inflow streak — the longest since mid-May. Notably, BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) was the only ETF to post an inflow, adding $125 million and marking its 34th consecutive trading day of positive net flows, according to data from CoinGlass.This marks the largest single-day ETF outflow since March 11, when $396 million exited the market.Bitcoin ETF Outflows: Market SnapshotThe sharp reversal comes amid a 3.5% decline in Bitcoin’s price, dropping from an intraday high of $108,850 to briefly below $105,000. Leading the outflows:Fidelity Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (FBTC): -$166 millionGrayscale Bitcoin Trust (GBTC): -$107.5 millionBitwise, Ark 21Shares, Invesco, VanEck, and Franklin Templeton ETFs also posted net outflows.BlackRock’s IBIT: +$125 millionMeanwhile, funds from CoinShares, WisdomTree, and Grayscale’s mini Bitcoin Trust recorded no flows.Despite the market pullback, BlackRock’s IBIT has maintained consistent momentum, now boasting $49 billion in net inflows and over $70 billion in assets under management (AUM). Over the last two weeks alone, IBIT added nearly $4 billion, underlining its appeal among institutional investors.Bitcoin vs. Gold: A Shifting LandscapeIn a related note, ETF Store President Nate Geraci observed that while over $9 billion has flowed into spot Bitcoin ETFs in the past five weeks, gold ETFs have experienced nearly $3 billion in outflows — highlighting a shift in investor sentiment toward digital assets over traditional safe-haven instruments.Ether ETFs Continue to ImpressIn contrast to Bitcoin ETFs, spot Ether ETFs saw $92 million in net inflows on May 29, extending their 10-day streak without an outflow. The iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA) from BlackRock led the charge, contributing over $50 million on the day and bringing its total inflows to $4.5 billion since its July 2024 launch.This bullish momentum follows the SEC’s recent clarification that staking is not considered a securities-related activity, which could pave the way for staking-enabled ETH ETFs and increased investor confidence.While most Bitcoin ETFs faced selling pressure, BlackRock's IBIT continues to stand out as a market leader, absorbing capital even during short-term corrections. Simultaneously, Ethereum's ETF inflows and regulatory tailwinds suggest growing institutional confidence in the broader crypto market.Stay tuned to Binance News for further ETF flow updates and crypto market insights.

data.title: SEC Staff Rules Out Security Status for Staking on Proof-of-Stake Blockchains
data.description:
The SEC has clarified that staking on certain proof-of-stake blockchains is not a securities transaction, easing long-standing regulatory concerns.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/staking-on-proof-of-stake-blockchains-not-security-transaction-sec-staff/

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin may "healthily adjust" around $106,000, institutions are bullish on the future
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Derive founder Nick Forster said that Bitcoin has entered a consolidation phase after its recent surge to $111,970. The current price fluctuates around $106,000, which will provide space for the market to "digest gains" and prepare for a new round of gains. He believes this is a "healthy adjustment" and not a bearish signal.
Forster pointed out that the U.S. International Trade Court rejected Trump's tariff decision, easing inflation concerns, and the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision on June 18 will be key. In addition, although BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF had a net inflow of more than $6.2 billion in May, the price has not yet fully reflected it, and institutional exposure is still expanding.
Researcher Sminston With predicts that the BTC cycle high can reach $220,000 to $330,000; trader Apsk32 believes that the target for 2025 is $220,000. Although Q3 has always been weak, Forster said that 2025 may usher in a "surprise performance" due to favorable regulations and continued institutional entry. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin eyes ‘healthy pause’ around $106K before price picks up steam
data.description:
Bitcoin’s consolidation will give “the market time to digest recent gains” before entering a new upward trend, Derive founder Nick Forster tells Cointelegraph.

data.title: Thailand’s SEC blocks and sues multiple crypto exchanges for unlicensed operations
data.description:
The Thailand SEC is set to block crypto exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX, and XT on June 28 and file lawsuits against them for offering unlicensed crypto services.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/thailands-sec-blocks-and-sues-exchanges/

data.title: Decentralized AI favored by majority of Americans: DCG poll
data.description:
A Harris poll commissioned by Digital Currency Group found 77% of surveyed Americans saw decentralized AI “as more beneficial to society overall. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/decentralized-ai-favored-majority-americans-dcg-harris-poll?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: DCG poll shows that 77% of American respondents support decentralized AI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the poll results commissioned by DCG and conducted by Harris, 77% of American respondents believe that decentralized AI is "more beneficial to society", of which 56% are more inclined to support this model. Most people are worried that centralized AI has stronger bias, high risk of data abuse and is more beneficial to large companies. DCG's vice president of policy said that the transformative power of AI should not be monopolized by a few technology giants. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: OKX will adjust the settlement frequency of LPTUSDT perpetual contract funding
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will adjust the funding settlement frequency of LPTUSDT perpetual contracts from May 30, 2025, from once every 4 hours to once every 2 hours, in order to better prevent market risks and further optimize the user trading experience.

data.title: Asian stocks dip as tariff trouble cause major sell off
data.description:
Asian markets fell on Friday due to investor fears after an appeals court restored Trump’s tariffs, ending an earlier ban. Beijing’s markets fell hardest after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said talks with China had stalled recently, hurting hopes for a lasting tariff deal. Bloomberg reported that Shanghai’s Composite Index and the CSI 300 both slipped […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/asian-stocks-dip-tariff-trouble/

Dubbed “Operation Stream,” this sweeping international effort, orchestrated by German and Dutch authorities under Europol’s coordination, culminated in the platform’s demise on 11 March 2025, shattering a network that boasted nearly [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/binance-helps-dismantle-global-child-exploitation-network-in-historic-operation-stream/

data.title: Bitcoin Bull James Wynn Close to Total Liquidation as Losses Near $100M
data.description:
James Wynn, the Hyperliquid trader who had at one time a billion-dollar notional position, has become an outsized victim of bitcoin's BTC cooling sentiment.Wynn's current highly leveraged BTC position, which he appears to be struggling to maintain, spiralled into a loss of nearly $100 million over the last week.Data from Hyperdash shows that Wynn's margin usage is nearing 100%, which would result in a total liquidation of his position, though Wynn recently made a deposit of $376,000 to bolster his defenses.The trader, known for making aggressive bets under the pseudonym "moonpig," currently holds a long position of approximately 1,690 BTC, valued at roughly $178
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/05/30/bitcoin-bull-james-wynn-close-to-total-liquidation-as-losses-near-100m
